title: Brawl Force
description:
A palladium addon that was used as a testing addon that adds a custom hero called Brawler.
Needs Palladium and Gravestone Core to work
body:
Needs Palladium and Gravestone Core to work
You need to craft a brawl vial, drink it and you will get the brawlpower. This is a testing addon for palladium, Ninja Force is next. With the brawlpower, you will be able to shoot an energy blast, beam and make a energy wave called a brawl wave. You can also craft the brawler suit to have more protection and the brawl blade for melee damage, which the recipes can be found in the gallery section
